subject: docs(todo): sun-sea-o fully resolved (correction)
body:
Live re-verification against the sun-sea-o repo (last push 2026-04-21,
same day as the parallel re-validation run) shows all items in my
previous TODO are already done. The parallel-validation agent ran
against a stale snapshot; a subsequent push landed the outstanding
items.

Verified live:
- index.html line 7 has <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
- src/components/common/InstallInstructionsModal.tsx lines 122-128
  has the "Already installed and the icon looks outdated?" <details>
  collapsible with platform-tailored reinstall steps
- src/utils/debugLog.ts has all 6 DEBUG_SYSTEM hardening items:
  * id: number field on DebugEntry (line 26) with nextId++ (line 50)
  * details?: Record<string, unknown> (lines 32, 47)
  * DebugSource extensibility via (string & {}) (line 19)
  * debugGenerateReport() exported from module (line 144)
  * redactUrl() + redactUrlsInText() with ?[redacted] (lines 107-118)
  * window.__debugLogListenersAttached HMR guard (line 163)
  * subscribe() replay with try/catch per-subscriber (line 81)
  * notify loop with try/catch per-subscriber (line 90)
- CLAUDE.md lines 697-699 has EVENT_BUS "Not Applicable Patterns"
  entry with rationale (Supabase realtime serves as de-facto bus)
- Hardcoded color migration complete. Only src/components/agreements/
  PdfPreview.tsx uses print:text-gray-* utilities — documented
  intentional print-media fallback in file header comment.

Updates:
- sun-sea-o section replaced with "FULLY RESOLVED" summary + evidence
- Gap Matrix sun-sea-o row: all Pass (DEBUG Partial->Pass, THEME
  Partial->Pass, ICON_CACHE_BUST Partial->Pass, EVENT_BUS Missing->N/A)
- Cross-Cutting Gaps summary moved sun-sea-o to "Fully clean" tier
- 16 cross-cutting bullets updated to reflect sun-sea-o completion

Tags: documentation, audit, todo, correction, cross-fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
